features.evidence: The screen is beautiful! The screen is beautiful I was initially a little disappointed I didn’t get the 4k version due to the price difference

Blazing fast, powerful CPU and graphics card, plenty of RAM and disk space, and so much more! Going to be upgrading ram and storage down the lineRuns GTA V Enhanced on High RT over 100fps in most scenariosI’ve also run Warframe with the “high preset” and runs over 120fpsit looks beautiful and performs beautiful!
It has a quality feel, it's fast, the price was right. for the price and what it can do this is a fabulous piece of tech.

So I had to pay to upgrade it as I prefer the Pro version as I have more control over the configuration of Windows itself. they’re not terrible by any means, just not super LOUD, most gamers would probably be using a headset anyway for voice chat/streaming/gameplay anyway…don’t let this steer you away, this is a great laptop despite not having “the best sound system in the world”I Don’t notice any excessive fan noise or overheating issues of any kindI’m using it everyday for gaming and I can’t leave it alone!

Fan stays quiet can’t ever hear it over my headphones. they’re not terrible by any means, just not super LOUD, most gamers would probably be using a headset anyway for voice chat/streaming/gameplay anyway…don’t let this steer you away, this is a great laptop despite not having “the best sound system in the world”I Don’t notice any excessive fan noise or overheating issues of any kindI’m using it everyday for gaming and I can’t leave it alone!
Blazing fast, powerful CPU and graphics card, plenty of RAM and disk space, and so much more! But, all-in-all, I am pleased with the performance, quality, and appearance of this laptop.
Wifi works great, and so far no heating issues. Plus, when I have a Bluetooth keyboard attached and activate the Num Lock, it actives the one on the mouse pad as well.

Plus, when I have a Bluetooth keyboard attached and activate the Num Lock, it actives the one on the mouse pad as well. the keyboard isn't the easiest to ready(prefer the keyboard on my MSI thin 15, much easier to see for these old eyes).

they’re not terrible by any means, just not super LOUD, most gamers would probably be using a headset anyway for voice chat/streaming/gameplay anyway…don’t let this steer you away, this is a great laptop despite not having “the best sound system in the world”I Don’t notice any excessive fan noise or overheating issues of any kindI’m using it everyday for gaming and I can’t leave it alone!
Battery lasts about as long as you would expect,
